samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Implement a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">CLK_in</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">RST</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">CLK_50</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">CLK_10</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">CLK_1</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_50.</description>
            <signal id="reset">Reset signal.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_CLK_in">Negative edge of CLK_in.</signal>
            <signal id="neg_RST">Negative edge of RST.</signal>
            <signal id="or_result">Result of OR operation between neg_CLK_in and neg_RST.</or_result>
            <signal id="CLK_50_reg">Register for CLK_50.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_50">Next value for CLK_50.</next_CLK_50>
            <always>
                <trigger>posedge CLK_in or posedge RST</trigger>
                <action>
                    if (RST) begin
                        CLK_50_reg <= 0;
                    end else begin
                        CLK_50_reg <= next_CLK_50;
                    end
                </action>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_10.</description>
            <signal id="cnt_10">Counter for CLK_10.</signal>
            <signal id="cnt_10_reg">Register for cnt_10.</signal>
            <signal id="next_cnt_10">Next value for cnt_10.</next_cnt_10>
            <signal id="CLK_10_reg">Register for CLK_10.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_10">Next value for CLK_10.</next_CLK_10>
            <always>
                <trigger>posedge CLK_in or posedge RST</trigger>
                <action>
                    if (RST) begin
                        cnt_10_reg <= 0;
                        CLK_10_reg <= 0;
                    end else begin
                        cnt_10_reg <= next_cnt_10;
                        CLK_10_reg <= next_CLK_10;
                    end
                </action>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Reset logic for CLK_1.</description>
            <signal id="cnt_100">Counter for CLK_1.</signal>
            <signal id="cnt_100_reg">Register for cnt_100.</signal>
            <signal id="next_cnt_100">Next value for cnt_100.</next_cnt_100>
            <signal id="CLK_1_reg">Register for CLK_1.</signal>
            <signal id="next_CLK_1">Next value for CLK_1.</next_CLK_1>
            <always>
                <trigger>posedge CLK_in or posedge RST</trigger>
                <action>
                    if (RST) begin
                        cnt_100_reg <= 0;
                        CLK_1_reg <= 0;
                    end else begin
                        cnt_100_reg <= next_cnt_100;
                        CLK_1_reg <= next_CLK_1;
                    end
                </action>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Reset logic for CLK_50: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set CLK_50 to 0. Otherwise, set CLK_50 to the inverted value of its current value.
Reset logic for CLK_10: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set cnt_10 to 0 and CLK_10 to 0. If cnt_10 is equal to 4, set CLK_10 to the inverted value of its current value and reset cnt_10 to 0. Otherwise, increment cnt_10 by 1.
Reset logic for CLK_1: On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, set cnt_100 to 0 and CLK_1 to 0. If cnt_100 is equal to 49, set CLK_1 to the inverted value of its current value and reset cnt_100 to 0. Otherwise, increment cnt_100 by 1.</implementation>
</module>
